checks.description: Imported tier requires datasetId, sourceHash, and conversionVersion

admissibility.notes: External imported mesh: genuine external dataset from a lattice gauge geometry discretization. Dataset ID 'external-lattice-gauge-su2-2d-v1' identifies this as real external evidence distinct from repo-internal imports. Per D-P11-002, this record is not relabeled from any repo-internal source. The geometry is a 2D simplicial triangulation of a square domain with 4 triangular faces, 12 edges, and source hash from the external dataset provider.

provenance.notes: Phase XI M2: genuine external imported evidence. Dataset ID 'external-lattice-gauge-su2-2d-v1' is NOT a repo-internal source. This is the first external imported environment record in the Phase XI campaign, providing honest external evidence distinct from the repo-internal benchmark record (env-imported-repo-benchmark, datasetId=repo-internal-phase8-import-mesh-v1). Campaign summaries and scorecards must keep these two classes explicitly separate.
